versions.version_description: I found that the other versions had a few important chords wrong, mostly in the chorus. So I decided to add a version that sounds right to me, it is very important to play the right sounding chords in songs.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Since the studio version of the song has a lot of bass, it's hard to hear the chords in some parts of the song. If you want to play along to it, pay attention to the singers in the background.

content:
Michael Buble
Haven't Met You Yet
Transcribed by Tim Green (Aeyyy!)

Capo 1st fret


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  (repeat throughout)
I'm Not Surprised[/tab]
Not Everything Lasts
I've Broken My Heart So Many Times,
I Stop Keeping Track.
Talk Myself In
I Talk Myself Out
I Get All Worked Up
And Then I Let Myself Down.


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  
I Tried So Very Hard Not To Loose It[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
I Came Up With A Million Excuses[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I Thought I Thought Of Every Possibility[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And I Know Someday That It'll All Turn Out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
You'll Make Me Work So We Can Work To Work It Out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And I Promise You Kid That I'll Get So Much More Than I Get[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  (repeat throughout)
Mmmmm ....[/tab]
I Might Have To Wait
I'll Never Give Up
I Guess It's Half Timing
And The Other Half's Luck
Wherever You Are
Whenever It's Right
You Come Out Of Nowhere And Into My Life


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  
And I Know That We Can Be So Amazing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
And Baby Your Love Is Gonna Change Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 
And Now I Can See Every Possibility[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Mmmmm ......[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And Somehow I Know That It Will All Turn Out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
And You'll Make Me Work So We Can Work To Work It Out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And I Promise You Kid I'll Get So Much More Than I Get[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
They Say All's Fair In Love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
And War But I Won't Need To Fight It[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We'll Get It Right[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And We'll Be United[/tab]

Horn Solo!!/Key Change!! whoa!
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]A#dim[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]



[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] 
And I Know That We Can Be So Amazing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
And Being In Your Life Is Gonna Change Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
And Now I Can See Every Single Possibility[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Mmmm .....[/tab]

And Someday I Know It'll All Turn Out[/tab]

And I'll Work To Work It Out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]A#dim[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Promise You Kid I'll Give More Than I Get[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Than I Get Than I Get Than I Get[/tab]


[Chorus]

Oh You Know It'll All Turn Out[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]A#dim[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Yeah I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch](briefly!) [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  (repeat throughout*)
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]
Oh Promise You Kid
To Give So Much More Than I Get
I Said Love Love Love Love Love Love Love .....
I Just Haven't Met You Yet
Love Love Love .....
I Just Haven't Met You Yet

*throw some F# roots on your D chords every now and then.  the last chord is a D.
